posts.text: Tragedy in Michigan as my brothers and sisters and their church are targets of violence. Praying for healing and comforting.
posts.quote: Tragedy in Michigan as my brothers and sisters and their church are targets of violence. Praying for healing and comforting.

posts.text: The shooting of Charlie Kirk has shocked and sickened me and my family. We extend our prayers and profound sorrow to Charlie and his family, many friends and followers. Another senseless act of violence appalls us.
posts.quote: The shooting of Charlie Kirk has shocked and sickened me and my family. We extend our prayers and profound sorrow to Charlie and his family, many friends and followers. Another senseless act of violence appalls us.

posts.text:
All know that a strong America is the best ally of peace—the world’s avaricious dictators of Russia, China, North Korea and Iran are hesitant to invade and brutalize in the face of 1) American strength and 2) American resolve. Our tepid response to Russia’s invasion of Georgia and Crimea surely contributed to Putin’s decision to invade Ukraine. 

American strength is greatest when we have friends that stand with us; we must not let economic squabbles fray the bonds of our alliances.

posts.text: Senator-elect @DaveMcCormickPA should obviously be invited to attend freshman senator orientation. The race has been called and he should be able to join his colleagues.
